plain_language.en: Routine checkup and consultation (Level 3) for a new patient
plain_language.es: Consulta médica de rutina (Nivel 3) para paciente nuevo
plain_language.fr: Consultation de routine (Niveau 3) pour nouveau patient

notes: New patient office visit, 30 minutes, low complexity decision making.
